entry.title: mistral-medium-3.5
entry.summary: Mistral Medium 3.5 is the first flagship model of Mistral AI that merged instruction-following, reasoning, and coding in a single set of 128B weights.
entry.content:
Mistral Medium 3.5 is the first flagship model of Mistral AI that merged instruction-following, reasoning, and coding in a single set of 128B weights.

Pulls: 13.3K

Tags: 5

entry.title: gemma4
entry.summary: Gemma 4 models are designed to deliver frontier-level performance at each size. They are well-suited for reasoning, agentic workflows, coding, and multimodal understanding.
entry.content:
Gemma 4 models are designed to deliver frontier-level performance at each size. They are well-suited for reasoning, agentic workflows, coding, and multimodal understanding.

Pulls: 7.2M

Tags: 30

entry.title: granite4.1
entry.summary: IBM Granite Models are a family of enterprise-ready, open foundation models that support multilingual capabilities, coding, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), tool use, and structured JSON output. Released under Apache 2.0 license.
entry.content:
IBM Granite Models are a family of enterprise-ready, open foundation models that support multilingual capabilities, coding, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), tool use, and structured JSON output. Released under Apache 2.0 license.

Pulls: 50.2K

Tags: 46

entry.title: laguna-xs.2
entry.summary: Laguna XS.2 is a 33B total parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B activated parameters per token designed for agentic coding and long-horizon work on a local machine.
entry.content:
Laguna XS.2 is a 33B total parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 3B activated parameters per token designed for agentic coding and long-horizon work on a local machine.

Pulls: 6,967

Tags: 7

entry.title: nemotron3
entry.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni is a multimodal large language model that unifies video, audio, image, and text understanding to support enterprise-grade Q&A, summarization, transcription, and document intelligence workflows.
entry.content:
NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni is a multimodal large language model that unifies video, audio, image, and text understanding to support enterprise-grade Q&A, summarization, transcription, and document intelligence workflows.

Pulls: 568.4K

Tags: 4

entry.title: deepseek-v4-pro
entry.summary: DeepSeek-V4-Pro is a frontier Mixture-of-Experts model with a 1M-token context window and three reasoning modes.
entry.content:
DeepSeek-V4-Pro is a frontier Mixture-of-Experts model with a 1M-token context window and three reasoning modes.

Pulls: 42.4K

Tags: 1

entry.title: deepseek-v4-flash
entry.summary: DeepSeek-V4-Flash is a preview of the DeepSeek-V4 series, a Mixture-of-Experts model with 284B total parameters and 13B activated, built for efficient reasoning across a 1M-token context window.
entry.content:
DeepSeek-V4-Flash is a preview of the DeepSeek-V4 series, a Mixture-of-Experts model with 284B total parameters and 13B activated, built for efficient reasoning across a 1M-token context window.

Pulls: 52K

Tags: 1

entry.title: qwen3.6
entry.summary: Qwen3.6 delivers substantial upgrades in agentic coding and thinking preservation than previous Qwen models.
entry.content:
Qwen3.6 delivers substantial upgrades in agentic coding and thinking preservation than previous Qwen models.

Pulls: 952.2K

Tags: 22

entry.title: kimi-k2.6
entry.summary: Kimi K2.6 is an open-source, native multimodal agentic model that advances practical capabilities in long-horizon coding, coding-driven design, proactive autonomous execution, and swarm-based task orchestration.
entry.content:
Kimi K2.6 is an open-source, native multimodal agentic model that advances practical capabilities in long-horizon coding, coding-driven design, proactive autonomous execution, and swarm-based task orchestration.

Pulls: 221.3K

Tags: 1

entry.title: medgemma
entry.summary: MedGemma is a collection of Gemma 3 variants that are trained for performance on medical text and image comprehension.
entry.content:
MedGemma is a collection of Gemma 3 variants that are trained for performance on medical text and image comprehension.

Pulls: 22.4K

Tags: 9

entry.title: medgemma1.5
entry.summary: MedGemma 1.5 4B is an updated version of the MedGemma 4B model.
entry.content:
MedGemma 1.5 4B is an updated version of the MedGemma 4B model.

Pulls: 13.3K

Tags: 5

entry.title: glm-5.1
entry.summary: GLM-5.1 is our next-generation flagship model for agentic engineering, with significantly stronger coding capabilities than its predecessor. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on SWE-Bench Pro and leads GLM-5 by a wide margin.
entry.content:
GLM-5.1 is our next-generation flagship model for agentic engineering, with significantly stronger coding capabilities than its predecessor. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on SWE-Bench Pro and leads GLM-5 by a wide margin.

Pulls: 412.7K

Tags: 1

entry.title: qwen3.5
entry.summary: Qwen 3.5 is a family of open-source multimodal models that delivers exceptional utility and performance.
entry.content:
Qwen 3.5 is a family of open-source multimodal models that delivers exceptional utility and performance.

Pulls: 9M

Tags: 58

entry.title: nemotron-cascade-2
entry.summary: An open 30B MoE model from NVIDIA with 3B activated parameters that delivers strong reasoning and agentic capabilities.
entry.content:

entry.title: minimax-m2.7

entry.title: nemotron-3-super
entry.summary: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is a 120B open MoE model activating just 12B parameters to deliver maximum compute efficiency and accuracy for complex multi-agent applications.
entry.content:
NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is a 120B open MoE model activating just 12B parameters to deliver maximum compute efficiency and accuracy for complex multi-agent applications.

Pulls: 562.3K

Tags: 7

entry.title: lfm2
entry.summary: LFM2 is a family of hybrid models designed for on-device deployment. LFM2-24B-A2B is the largest model in the family, scaling the architecture to 24 billion parameters while keeping inference efficient.
entry.content:
LFM2 is a family of hybrid models designed for on-device deployment. LFM2-24B-A2B is the largest model in the family, scaling the architecture to 24 billion parameters while keeping inference efficient.

Pulls: 1.1M

Tags: 6

entry.title: minimax-m2.5
entry.summary: MiniMax-M2.5 is a state-of-the-art large language model designed for real-world productivity and coding tasks.
entry.content:
MiniMax-M2.5 is a state-of-the-art large language model designed for real-world productivity and coding tasks.

Pulls: 449.4K

Tags: 1

entry.title: glm-5
entry.summary: A strong reasoning and agentic model from Z.ai with 744B total parameters (40B active), built for complex systems engineering and long-horizon tasks.
entry.content:

Pulls: 478.8K

entry.title: qwen3-coder-next
entry.summary: Qwen3-Coder-Next is a coding-focused language model from Alibaba's Qwen team, optimized for agentic coding workflows and local development.
entry.content:
